file_roles.architecture_domain_rules.md: Architecture selection, domain routing, and right-sized system-shape decisions.

file_roles.counterexample_improvement_protocol.md: Counterexample-Guided Improvement / CEGIS rules for finding and repairing failure cases.
file_roles.delegation_access_policy.md: Delegation, access, evidence-claim, and rational-route boundaries.
file_roles.delivery_protocol.md: Delivery format, artifact destination, release handoff, and no-snippets-only rules.
file_roles.github_download_link_protocol.md: GitHub download-link selection, link-type classification, and failed-run handling.
file_roles.gpt_action_discovery_protocol.md: Action discovery for GPT/Project tools, UI handoffs, and capability routing.
file_roles.instruction_governance.md: Instruction authority, placement, compression, and lower-authority file controls.
file_roles.mutation_testing_protocol.md: Mutation testing for protected behavior and regression-resistance checks.
file_roles.openai_gpt_project_sources.md: OpenAI GPT/Project source facts and source-use boundaries.
file_roles.output_templates.md: User-facing report, matrix, ledger, and delivery templates.
file_roles.package_state_protocol.md: Stable/Candidate/runtime/local/archive state semantics and source-of-truth rules.
file_roles.patch_lock_protocol.md: Patch Lock, Patch State Machine, Builder/Auditor split, and deletion burden.
file_roles.project_design_super_pipeline_protocol.m: Meta-Optimization, Hidden Requirements Mining, CEGIS, Mutation Testing, Pareto, and Ledger pipeline.
file_roles.project_learning_ledger.md: Failure-class learning, anti-regression ledger, and prevention mechanism records.
file_roles.project_operating_protocol.md: Daily operating rules for project-design work and package handling.
file_roles.protected_behavior_registry.md: Protected behavior IDs, preservation rules, and weakening/removal burden.
file_roles.regression_smoke_tests.md: Golden regression prompts, traps, expected behavior, and fail conditions.
file_roles.rule_admission_protocol.md: Rule Admission Gate, placement classification, and Thin Kernel preservation.
file_roles.source_safety_policy.md: Source freshness, safety, no-secrets, and evidence-quality policy.
file_roles.testing_protocol.md: Executable tests, pass/fail criteria, evidence grades, and hard pass threshold.

external_eval_layers.promptfoo: Optional repo-only red-team/eval layer for major releases; not active ChatGPT Project Knowledge.
external_eval_layers.inspect_ai: Optional formal eval runner for high-risk releases; not active ChatGPT Project Knowledge.
external_eval_layers.garak_or_harmbench: Optional safety/vulnerability scan for public-facing child systems; evidence only.
external_eval_layers.langfuse_style_ledger: Version, rollback, observation, and human-review ledger pattern; reports only unless explicitly integrated.

non_active_folders.archive/old_packages/: Old packages. Evidence only. Never treat as active unless the user explicitly asks for comparison, restoration, or rollback.
non_active_folders.archive/rejected_versions/: Rejected versions. Never active unless explicitly restored by the user.
non_active_folders.deliveries/final_outputs/: Delivery history only. Never treat as active source of truth.
non_active_folders.deliveries/zip_packages/: ZIP delivery history only. Never treat ZIPs as active source of truth.
non_active_folders.evals/: External eval/red-team specifications and assertion packs. Repo-only evidence/control layer; never upload as active ChatGPT Project Knowledge.
non_active_folders.external_sources/notes/: Reference notes only. Do not treat as behavioral rules unless copied into current/source_files/.
non_active_folders.external_sources/openai_sources/: OpenAI/reference source evidence only. Do not treat as behavioral rules unless copied into current/source_files/.
non_active_folders.reports/: Release, observability, audit, and evaluation reports/templates. Evidence only; never active Project Knowledge.
non_active_folders.tests/audit_reports/: Audit evidence only. Do not treat audit reports as active rules.
non_active_folders.tests/smoke_tests/: Testing evidence only. Use for tests; do not treat as active package rules.

rules: Use current/ as the only active package by default.
Use archive/ only for comparison, restoration, rollback, or historical audit when the user explicitly asks.
Use deliveries/ only to inspect what was delivered, not as active truth.
Use evals/ only as external test/control evidence, not as active behavior rules.
Use external_sources/ only as reference/source evidence, not as active behavior rules.
Use reports/ only as release, observability, audit, or evaluation evidence, not as active behavior rules.
Use tests/ only for audit and regression evidence, not as active behavior rules.
If current/ conflicts with archive/, deliveries/, evals/, external_sources/, reports/, tests/, or chat history, current/ wins unless the user explicitly overrides it.
If package_manifest.json conflicts with chat history, package_manifest.json wins unless the user explicitly overrides it.
Do not infer active status from file names outside current/.
Do not mix files across current/, archive/, deliveries/, evals/, external_sources/, reports/, and tests/ without reporting the reason.
If GitHub is unavailable, inaccessible, or not indexed, state the limitation and ask for ZIP/files instead of inventing repository contents.

chatgpt_project_upload_rule.project_instructions: Paste the content of current/instructions/Instructions.md into the Project Instructions field.
chatgpt_project_upload_rule.project_sources: Upload only active source files packaged as Knowledge/*.md into Project Sources/Knowledge. Do not upload package_manifest.json, package_linter.py, scripts/, .github/workflows/, tests/, reports/, evals/, UPLOAD_GUIDE.md, CODEX_TASK*.md, archive/, deliveries/, external_sources/, repo ZIPs, or other repo-only controls as active ChatGPT Project Knowledge unless explicitly requested as non-active audit/reference material.

github_connector_rule.repository_access: Allow ChatGPT access only to the selected repository project-designer-gpt.
github_connector_rule.memory_and_chats_toggle: Keep off by default to reduce risk of mixing old chats with GitHub current/.
github_connector_rule.archive_access: Use archive/ only when explicitly requested.
